question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between Chicago Bulls and Oklahoma City Thunder on 2026-03-27?
question.context: Chicago Bulls (29-43) at Oklahoma City Thunder (57-16). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: The Oklahoma City Thunder are one of the best teams in the NBA with a 57-16 record, playing at home against a mediocre Chicago Bulls team (29-43). OKC tends to play at a moderate pace and has a strong defense, which can suppress scoring. The Bulls are a middle-of-the-pack offensive team. Average NBA game totals in 2025-26 are around 225-230 points combined. OKC's strong defense may keep this slightly below average. I estimate around 226 total points, accounting for OKC's defensive efficiency and home court advantage, with the Bulls likely struggling to keep pace. The Thunder typically score efficiently but may not need to push the pace against a weaker opponent.
